title: CPI YoY > 3.2% (March 2026)
rules_primary: This market resolves YES if the Bureau of Labor Statistics reports CPI YoY > 3.2%.

title: Fed Funds Rate <= 4.5% (March FOMC)
rules_primary: This market resolves YES if the FOMC sets the target range upper bound at or below 4.50%.

title: NFP > 200K (March 2026)
rules_primary: This market resolves YES if Nonfarm Payrolls exceed 200,000.
